theme_strategy.description: Admin panel uses a high-energy, high-contrast 'Dynamic' theme. Teacher panel uses a calm, minimal 'Organic' theme.

buttons.admin_primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 font-semibold shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5
buttons.teacher_primary: bg-teal-600 text-white hover:bg-teal-700 font-medium shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all rounded-full px-8 py-3

cards.admin_dashboard: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.teacher_card: bg-white border-0 ring-1 ring-stone-100 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.wrapper: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-lg border bg-white shadow-sm
tables.header: bg-slate-50 border-b p-4 text-left font-semibold text-slate-600

layout.grid_teacher: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 max-w-5xl mx-auto

login_hero.description: Modern library study scene, good for login side panel or landing hero

teacher_dashboard_promo.description: Teacher helping student, use for teacher portal welcome or empty states

empty_state_students.description: Wide shot of library, good for empty student list background (faded)

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on colored backgrounds meets APCA guidelines (min Lc 60).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
For Admin Pages: Use 'grid_admin' layout and 'admin_palette' colors. Prioritize density and data visibility.
For Teacher Pages: Use 'grid_teacher' layout and 'teacher_palette' colors. Prioritize whitespace and focus.
Login Page: Split screen. Left side form, Right side 'login_hero' image with a quote overlay.
Forms: Use Shadcn Form/Input components but style them according to the role (Admin vs Teacher).
Charts: Use 'Recharts' with the defined palette colors.
Sidebar: Admin gets a collapsible vertical sidebar (dark blue or white). Teacher gets a simple top navigation bar (minimal).
universal_guidelines: DO NOT use generic centered layouts. Use grid-based asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index hierarchy).
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, active, focus).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical defaults (p-8 instead of p-4).
Avoid using gradients for dark colors; use them for subtle light backgrounds only.
Never use pure black (#000000); use slate-900 or zinc-900.
